promptDescription: - **rangearea** — shaded band between two values over a shared x-axis (time or ordered categories). Best for monthly min/max revenue bands, forecast confidence intervals, or price floor/ceiling trends. Spec: { "type":"rangearea", "title":"...", "xLabel":"Month", "yLabel":"Revenue ($)", "seriesLabel":"Revenue Range", "labels":["Jan","Feb","Mar"], "low":[80000,95000,72000], "high":[240000,275000,210000] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];function getT(){return{text:'#1a1a18',text2:'#5a5a56',grid:'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'};}function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i<document.scripts.length;i++){if(document.scripts[i].src===url){if(document.scripts[i]._ld){cb();return;}document.scripts[i].addEventListener('load',cb);return;}}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=function(){s._ld=true;cb();};document.head.appendChild(s);}load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/apexcharts@3/dist/apexcharts.min.js','ApexCharts',function(){if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='420px';wrap._chartSpec=spec;var t=getT();var baseChart={background:'#ffffff',toolbar:{show:false},fontFamily:'Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif',foreColor:t.text};var titleOpt={text:spec.title||'',align:'center',style:{fontSize:'13px',fontWeight:'500',color:t.text}};var axisLabel={style:{colors:t.text2,fontSize:'11px'}};var rlabels=spec.labels||[];var low=spec.low||[];var high=spec.high||[];var raData=rlabels.map(function(x,i){return{x:x,y:[+(low[i]!=null?low[i]:0),+(high[i]!=null?high[i]:0)]};});var raXaxis={categories:rlabels,labels:axisLabel};if(spec.xLabel)raXaxis.title={text:spec.xLabel,style:{color:t.text2,fontSize:'11px'}};var raYaxis={labels:{style:{colors:t.text2,fontSize:'11px'},formatter:function(v){return v.toLocaleString();}}};if(spec.yLabel)raYaxis.title={text:spec.yLabel,style:{color:t.text2,fontSize:'11px'}};var options={chart:Object.assign({},baseChart,{type:'rangeArea',height:'100%'}),series:[{name:spec.seriesLabel||'Range',type:'rangeArea',data:raData}],colors:[C[0]],fill:{opacity:[0.22]},stroke:{curve:'smooth',width:[2]},xaxis:raXaxis,yaxis:raYaxis,title:titleOpt,tooltip:{shared:false},theme:{mode:'light'},grid:{borderColor:t.grid}};new ApexCharts(wrap,options).render();});}
